result.stderr:
Geohash.Polyhasher.CLI 0.2.1+afe27d2ffa7b6b797f2817e860ce119b22d5fddb
Copyright © 2026 Andreas Ravnestad

  -f, --input-file         Path to input file

  -F, --format             (Default: WKT) Input format. Supported formats are:
                           WKT. Default value: WKT

  -p, --precision          (Default: 6) The geohash precision level to use when
                           hashing the geometries. Default value: 6

  -m, --mode               (Default: Intersects) Which mode to use. Supported
                           modes are: Intersect, Contains. Default: Intersect

  -e, --edge-handling      (Default: WGS84) How geometry edges are interpreted.
                           Supported values: WGS84, WebMercator, Geodesic.
                           Default: WGS84

  -g, --output-geometry    (Default: false) Enable this to output the result as
                           CSV with WKB geometries added for individual hashes.
                           Default value: false

  -h, --headers            (Default: false) If output-geometry is enabled, then
                           enable this to add CSV headers to the output. Default
                           value: false

  -s, --separator          (Default: ;) If output-geometry is enabled, this
                           option can be used to customize the column separator

  --help                   Display this help screen.

  --version                Display version information.

Geohash.Polyhasher.CLI 0.2.1+afe27d2ffa7b6b797f2817e860ce119b22d5fddb
Copyright © 2026 Andreas Ravnestad

  -f, --input-file         Path to input file

  -F, --format             (Default: WKT) Input format. Supported formats are:
                           WKT. Default value: WKT

  -p, --precision          (Default: 6) The geohash precision level to use when
                           hashing the geometries. Default value: 6

  -m, --mode               (Default: Intersects) Which mode to use. Supported
                           modes are: Intersect, Contains. Default: Intersect

  -e, --edge-handling      (Default: WGS84) How geometry edges are interpreted.
                           Supported values: WGS84, WebMercator, Geodesic.
                           Default: WGS84

  -g, --output-geometry    (Default: false) Enable this to output the result as

                           Default value: false

  -h, --headers            (Default: false) If output-geometry is enabled, then

  -s, --separator          (Default: ;) If output-geometry is enabled, this

  --help                   Display this help screen.

  --version                Display version information.

options.description: How geometry edges are interpreted. Supported values: WGS84, WebMercator, Geodesic. Default: WGS84
Input format. Supported formats are: WKT. Default value: WKT
If output-geometry is enabled, then enable this to add CSV headers to the output. Default value: false
Which mode to use. Supported modes are: Intersect, Contains. Default: Intersect
Enable this to output the result as CSV with WKB geometries added for individual hashes. Default value: false
The geohash precision level to use when hashing the geometries. Default value: 6
If output-geometry is enabled, this option can be used to customize the column separator
